heading: Omitted
label: 44 to 46 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 44, , , authorized a mileage allowance to Delegate from Alaska, and was omitted from the Code as obsolete because Alaska was admitted into the Union with membership of one Representative in Congress on , upon issuance of Proc.
